Title: Open Main Menu
Windows: Alt + F or Alt + E or F10 + Enter

Title: Jump to Previous Tab
Windows: Ctrl + Shift + Tab / Ctrl + Page Up

Title: Hard Reload (Ignore Cache)
Windows: Ctrl + Shift + R / Ctrl + Shift + F5

Title: Paste and Go / Search from Address Bar
Quit Brave
Windows: Ctrl + Shift + W or Alt + F then X
